Driver Distraction Detection Alert System

Real-time driver monitoring for enhanced road safety.

View Source Code

Driver Distraction Detection

This project detects distracted driving behaviors using live or recorded video feeds. I implemented the detection pipeline and alert system, integrating a YOLOv8-based model for high-accuracy predictions.

### Core Features

  • Real-time distraction detection (phone use, yawning, looking away, etc.).
  • Works with both live camera feed and video files.
  • Alert system with visual and audio warnings.
  • Efficient detection pipeline using YOLOv8 for fast processing.
  • Integration with GUI for monitoring and logging alerts.

The goal of this project was to enhance road safety by providing immediate alerts to drivers showing distracted behavior.
